items.title: Image/group of related processes figure dependency
items.reason: The PRLI introduction explicitly references figure 4 for the meaning of an image/group of related processes, but the figure assets extracted for page 197 are unlabeled crops and were not reliable enough to support accepted figure facts. The dependency remains open.

items.title: Image-pair figure dependency
items.reason: The PRLI introduction and page 198 text explicitly reference figure 5 for image pairs, but the extracted figure assets on page 198 were unlabeled crops and not reliable enough for accepted figure-specific claims. The dependency remains open.

items.title: PRLI/PRLO page message-format dependency
items.reason: The PRLI/PRLO protocol text repeatedly specifies request and LS_ACC response page validity bits, PAs, and Establish Image Pair behavior, implying a concrete page format, but the corresponding page layout/bit tables were not located in the inspected pages/assets. Because the referenced message structure was not inspected, it remains unresolved.

evidence_refs.quote: For each PRLI request page the Originator and Responder PA validity bits are set to one and valid
For each LS_ACC response page, the Originator and Responder PA validity bits are set to one and
the Establish Image Pair bit set to one in order to create image pairs in an binding manner.
